description: You are a youth soccer coach preparing for a tactical review session. Using the game recording at /home/ga/Videos/game_footage.mp4 (180 seconds, 1280x720, 30fps, left channel: coach commentary, right channel: ambient noise) and the play log at /home/ga/Documents/game_log.txt, generate a complete analysis package in /home/ga/Videos/game_analysis/. The package must contain: six individual play clips ('play_01.mp4' through 'play_06.mp4') extracted at the log timestamps using H.264/AAC; three slow-motion clips ('slowmo_02.mp4', 'slowmo_04.mp4', 'slowmo_06.mp4') of plays 2, 4, and 6 at 0.5x speed; six tactical formation snapshots ('formation_01.png' through 'formation_06.png') from the start of each play; a mono MP3 file ('coach_commentary.mp3', bitrate >= 128 kbps) of the left audio channel; an M3U playlist ('highlights.m3u') for plays 1, 3, and 5 in order; and a 'game_manifest.json' documenting all 18 deliverables. The manifest must include a top-level "source" field, a "total_deliverables" count, and an array of files where each entry contains "filename" and "type" (clip, slowmo, snapshot, audio, or playlist).
